en_title: id Software Was Reportedly 'Toying With' Pitches for a New Perfect Dark, a John Wick-Inspired Game, and More Before Layoffs
cn_title: id Software裁员前曾构思新《完美黑暗》等多个项目
subtitle: 小团队难续前路
opus_summary: 据报道，微软裁撤id Software逾半数员工前，该工作室曾构思包括新《完美黑暗》、类《疾速追杀》科幻新作及多人《毁灭战士》在内的多个项目；如今这些计划的前景均不明朗。

paragraphs.en: id Software was reportedly toying with a bunch of ideas for future game projects when Microsoft laid off more than half of the studio.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，微软裁撤id Software逾半数员工时，这家工作室正构思多个未来游戏项目。

paragraphs.en: According to a new report from GamesBeat, 92 of 185 full-time employees were laid off from id Software. This has put a number of projects in question. The report notes that the studio was working on a bunch of projects, and sources aren't sure how they can move forward on them with such a small team.
paragraphs.cn: GamesBeat最新报道称，id Software的185名全职员工中有92人遭裁，这令多个项目陷入疑问。报道指出，工作室当时正推进若干项目，但消息人士不确定如此小的团队要如何继续推进。

paragraphs.en: I'm not convinced there is a viable way forward, said one laid-off worker when speaking with GamesBeat. It feels like a bunch of knee-jerk responses.
paragraphs.cn: 一名被裁员工向GamesBeat表示：「我不相信还有可行的前进道路。这感觉像是一连串的仓促反应。」

paragraphs.en: id Software just finished its work on the new Doom: The Dark Ages DLC, known as Revelations, and was looking at what its next full-scale project would be. One was a co-op/multiplayer Doom game that would've brought back weaponry from previous Doom games. Another was a new Perfect Dark game, since the property became available last year in the wake of Xbox's shutdown of developer The Initiative and cancellation of its Perfect Dark reboot.
paragraphs.cn: id Software刚完成《毁灭战士：黑暗时代》DLC「Revelations」的工作，随后开始评估下一款大型项目。其中之一是可带回历代《毁灭战士》武器的合作或多人游戏；另一项则是新的《完美黑暗》，因为XBOX去年关闭开发商The Initiative并取消《完美黑暗》重启作后，该IP已可供接手。

paragraphs.en: There were also concepts for a new game codenamed Fury. id Software apparently saw this as a way to stretch its legs beyond Doom, and envisioned it as a John Wick-inspired, noir sci-fi game with Chicago and Louisiana gangsters. Like John Wick, it would've combined martial arts with gunplay. The hope was to make it for Project Helix, the next-gen Xbox.
paragraphs.cn: 另有一款代号「Fury」的新作概念。id Software显然希望借此跳出《毁灭战士》的框架，将其设想为一款受《疾速追杀》启发、带有芝加哥和路易斯安那黑帮元素的黑色科幻游戏，结合武术与枪战玩法，并计划面向下一代XBOX的Project Helix开发。

paragraphs.en: One other project that was being kicked around was a Westworld-inspired survival game, but not much else is known about it. It's unclear if any of these projects will move forward, or if id Software will just become a support studio, assisting on games like The Elder Scrolls 6, Wolfenstein 3, Marvel's Blade, or other projects within Xbox.
paragraphs.cn: 团队还讨论过一款受《西部世界》启发的生存游戏，但已知信息不多。目前尚不清楚这些项目是否会继续，或是id Software将转为支援工作室，协助《上古卷轴6》《德军总部3》《漫威刀锋战士》或其他XBOX项目。

paragraphs.en: Last year, a similar situation happened to Turn 10 Studios, the team behind the Forza Motorsport franchise. The team was gutted as part of mass layoffs and there are now questions over whether or not the Motorsport series will continue, or if it will be completely replaced by the more successful Forza Horizon games.
paragraphs.cn: 去年，《极限竞速》系列开发商Turn 10 Studios也遭遇类似情况。该团队在大规模裁员中被严重削减，如今外界正质疑《极限竞速》正传是否还能延续，或会被更成功的《极限竞速：地平线》系列彻底取代。
